title: CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR FAMILY DEVELOPMENT WEST BUILDING CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance abuse treatment. 240 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, evening and weekend availability as needed (541) 342-8437 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-8437 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: OHP, some private insurance, and cash are accepted, depending on the program. Slots may be available for individuals without insurance. DOCUMENTS: Call for more information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
